detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TARO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TARO.sol#659-783):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (TARO.sol#723)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (TARO.sol#797-809)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (TARO.sol#729)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (TARO.sol#817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TARO.sol#781)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (TARO.sol#953)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (TARO.sol#933)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (TARO.sol#935)
	TARO._rOwned (TARO.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TARO._takeTeam(uint256) (TARO.sol#947-955)
	- TARO._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (TARO.sol#907-943)
	- TARO.balanceOf(address) (TARO.sol#485-489)
	- TARO.constructor() (TARO.sol#419-449)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TARO.sol#781)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (TARO.sol#961)
	TARO._rTotal (TARO.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TARO._getCurrentSupply() (TARO.sol#1103-1113)
	- TARO._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (TARO.sol#959-965)
	- TARO.constructor() (TARO.sol#419-449)
	- TARO.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (TARO.sol#581-603)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [TARO._transfer(address,address,uint256)](TARO.sol#L659-L783):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](TARO.sol#L723)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](TARO.sol#L797-L809)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](TARO.sol#L729)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](TARO.sol#L817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](TARO.sol#L781)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](TARO.sol#L953)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](TARO.sol#L933)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](TARO.sol#L935)
	[TARO._rOwned](TARO.sol#L335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [TARO._takeTeam(uint256)](TARO.sol#L947-L955)
	- [TARO._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](TARO.sol#L907-L943)
	- [TARO.balanceOf(address)](TARO.sol#L485-L489)
	- [TARO.constructor()](TARO.sol#L419-L449)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](TARO.sol#L781)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](TARO.sol#L961)
	[TARO._rTotal](TARO.sol#L347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [TARO._getCurrentSupply()](TARO.sol#L1103-L1113)
	- [TARO._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](TARO.sol#L959-L965)
	- [TARO.constructor()](TARO.sol#L419-L449)
	- [TARO.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](TARO.sol#L581-L603)
